menu.noMenuDesc: There are currently no menu items available.
menu.noItemsDesc: There are currently no menu items available at this branch.
menu.noBranchesDesc: There are currently no active restaurant branches.
menu.branchBusy: This branch is currently busy and not accepting orders.
menu.tryLater: Please try again later or select a different branch.
menu.specialInstructionsPlaceholder: Any special requests? (e.g., no onions, extra spicy)

cart.title: Cart
cart.emptyDesc: Add items from the menu to get started

checkout.orderInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g. Gate code, floor, ring the bell, leave at the door, call when outside…
checkout.when: When do you want to receive your order?
checkout.standardOrder: Standard: Begin preparing your order right away
checkout.pickDatePickup: Pick Date & Time for Pickup at {{branch}}
checkout.outOfRangeDesc: Delivery isn't available for this address (outside our delivery area). Please change your address if you're not at the selected location.
checkout.noLocationSelected: No delivery location selected yet. Please set your delivery address to continue to payment.
checkout.branchBusy: This branch is currently busy and not accepting orders. Please try again shortly.
checkout.branchClosed: This branch is currently closed. You can schedule your order for later or try again during operating hours

orders.title: Order History
orders.subtitle: Track your past orders
orders.noOrdersDesc: Start ordering to see your order history

orderTracking.orderNotFoundDesc: We couldn't find the order you're looking for.
orderTracking.cancelledByCustomer: Your order has been cancelled as requested. We're sorry to see it go!
orderTracking.cancelledByRestaurant: We sincerely apologize — your order could not be fulfilled. We hope to serve you better next time.
orderTracking.cancelConfirmDesc: You can only cancel before the restaurant confirms. This action cannot be undone.
orderTracking.statusPending: Your order is being reviewed by the restaurant
orderTracking.statusConfirmed: Great news! The restaurant has accepted your order
orderTracking.statusPreparing: Your delicious food is being prepared
orderTracking.statusReadyPickup: Your order is ready! Head to the restaurant to pick it up
orderTracking.statusReadyDelivery: Your order is ready and waiting for the driver
orderTracking.statusOutForDelivery: Your order is on its way!
orderTracking.statusDelivered: Your order has been delivered. Enjoy!
orderTracking.cashbackAdded: Cashback has been added to your balance

booking.title: Reserve a Table
booking.subtitle: Choose your branch, party size, date & time to get started
booking.noFloorPlan: No floor plan configured for this branch.

booking.selectDateTime: Select a date & time to see availability
booking.selectBranchForTables: Select a branch to see available tables
booking.largeParty: Large party — table combination required. Admin will arrange seating upon approval.
booking.exceedsCapacity: Party size exceeds restaurant capacity. Please contact us directly.
booking.canvasHint: Scroll to zoom · Drag to pan · Pinch to zoom on mobile · Tap any available table to reserve

reservations.title: Reservation History
reservations.subtitle: Your past and upcoming reservations
reservations.noReservationsDesc: Book a table to see your reservations here
reservations.cancelConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to cancel your reservation? This action cannot be undone.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove all your data.

auth.resetPasswordDesc: Enter your email to receive a password reset link
auth.passwordRequirements: Must be at least 12 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and numbers
auth.alreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists
auth.createFailed: Failed to create account. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.changeLanguageDesc: The app will restart to apply the new language. Any unsaved changes may be lost.

address.dragToAdjust: Drag the pin to adjust position

checkoutSuccess.thankYou: Thank you for your order! Your payment has been processed successfully.
checkoutSuccess.trackOrder: You can track your order status in your orders page.
checkoutSuccess.chargedContact: If you were charged, please contact our support team.
